join_order.note: adsh_code == sub_row_index; no hash join needed; sub_row = num_adsh[i] is O(1)

filters.implementation: load num/uom_dict.txt at runtime; find usd_code index; filter num_uom[i] == usd_code
fy2022[num_adsh[i]] — direct bool array check after sub_row = num_adsh[i]

data_structures.fy2022_filter: flat_array bool[86135] — O(1) lookup by sub_row_index; fits in L2 cache
data_structures.outer_aggregation: open_addressing_hash_map(capacity=65536, key=uint64_t packed (name_code<<32|cik), value=double sum) — thread-local per thread, sized for full 27K cardinality per C9
data_structures.inner_aggregation: open_addressing_hash_map(capacity=65536, key=int32_t cik, value=double sum) — thread-local per thread, sized for full 20K cardinality per C9
data_structures.topk_buffer: std::vector<(uint64_t key, double sum)> — std::partial_sort top 100 DESC

dual_accumulation.description: Single pass over num; each row contributes to BOTH outer (name,cik) and inner (cik) aggregations
dual_accumulation.note: Eliminates second scan over num; computes scalar subquery in same pass (P4)

parallel_phases: parallel_scan_num_dual_accumulate: #pragma omp parallel for schedule(dynamic, 100000) — each thread owns thread-local outer_map + inner_map
parallelism.merge_phase: sequential merge of 64 thread-local outer_maps (27K groups) and inner_maps (20K groups) into global maps — small enough for O(nthreads * groups) sequential merge
parallelism.thread_local_sizing: Each thread's hash maps sized for FULL cardinality (65536 slots), NOT cardinality/nthreads (C9)

indexes.purpose: Direct sub column access: sub_fy[adsh_code], sub_name[adsh_code], sub_cik[adsh_code] — no file needed

scalar_subquery.description: HAVING threshold = AVG(per-cik SUM(value)) computed from inner_map after merge
scalar_subquery.implementation: double total_sum = 0.0; int64_t cik_count = 0; for each slot in global_inner_map: total_sum += slot.value; cik_count++; double threshold = total_sum / cik_count;

aggregation: hash_group_by with open-addressing thread-local maps; dual-key composite (name_code, cik) for outer; single-key cik for inner

hash_table_rules.probing: bounded for-loop: for(int probe=0; probe<cap; probe++) — NOT unbounded while (C24)
hash_table_rules.sentinel_init: std::fill() for multi-byte sentinels — NEVER memset for non-zero patterns (C20)

dict_loading.uom_dict: load num/uom_dict.txt at runtime; scan for 'USD' to get usd_code (C2)
dict_loading.name_dict: load sub/name_dict.txt at runtime for output decoding (C2)
